subcodes.first_line: O thou maidservant of God! Though thy letter was brief in words, it was ample in significance. It indicated that thy heart is illumined... The Tree of Life which is full of blossoms, leaves and fruits, the shade thereof is peace to the soul... But shade trees are many in the forest, which though fresh and verdant, are nevertheless fruitless.
subcodes.subjects: @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @symbolism, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
